request_approved.subject: Visit Request Approved - {id}
request_approved.body: Dear {name}, your visit to {destination} is approved by {approver}. Approval Number: {id}. Gate: {gate}. Date: {from} to {to}.{comment}

request_rejected.subject: Visit Request Rejected - {destination}
request_rejected.body: Your visit request to {destination} (Gate: {gate}) on {date} has been rejected.{reason}

guest_checkin.subject: Guest Check-In Alert
guest_checkin.body: Guest {name} from {organization} has checked in at Gate {gate}.

guest_checkout.subject: Guest Check-Out Confirmation
guest_checkout.body: Hello {name}, your check-out from {destination} has been recorded. We value your feedback. Please share your experience here: {surveyUrl}

host_verified.subject: Visit Request Verified - {destination}
host_verified.body: Dear {name}, your visit request to {destination} has been verified by {host} and is now under security review.

host_denied.subject: Visit Request Declined - {destination}
host_denied.body: Dear {name}, your visit request to {destination} has been declined by {host}.{reason}

blacklist_alert.subject: VMS3 Blacklist Alert
blacklist_alert.body: Blacklist attempt by {requester}: {name} from {organization}. Matched By: {matchedBy}.

approver1_reminder.subject: VMS3 Approval Reminder
approver1_reminder.body: Reminder: Request {id} has been pending Review > 24h.

user_registration.subject: Welcome to {tenant}

request_submitted_approver.subject: New Visit Request - {destination}
request_submitted_approver.body: A new visit request for {destination} from {requester} requires your review. Review here: {url}

request_ready_approver2.subject: Final Review Required - {destination}
request_ready_approver2.body: A visit request for {destination} from {requester} has been processed by Approver 1 and is pending your review: {url}

request_finalized_reception.subject: Approved Visit - {destination}
request_finalized_reception.body: A visit for {guestCount} guest(s) to {destination} ({fromDate} to {toDate}) has been approved. View the reception dashboard: {url}
